fields.label: EE grn_id
fields.description: EasyEcom-assigned int — the natural primary key on /Grn/V2/getGrnDetails (`grn_id`). EE-born; we never invent these. UNIQUE: idempotency hinge for the Stage 3 pull (re-pulling the same grn_id is a no-op).

fields.label: Status
fields.options:
Pending
Receipted
Held-Pre-QC
STN-Routed
Failed
Discrepancy
Deleted-Post-Receipt
Dismissed
fields.description: §9 GRN-Map state. Pending = observed, not yet processable (e.g. Item/Supplier Map missing). Receipted = PR created + submitted. Held-Pre-QC = observed but grn_status_id < grn_receipt_trigger_status (re-evaluated next poll). STN-Routed = vendor_c_id == inwarded_warehouse_c_id; §10 STN-inward picks up. Failed = receipting attempted and failed (see linked Sync Record). Discrepancy: receipted-with-line-discrepancy (tolerance/HSN) OR unknown-PO drift (no auto-PR, FDE-driven resolution via 'Create PR from this GRN'); the linked Integration Discrepancy disambiguates via `kind`. Deleted-Post-Receipt = EE flipped grn_status_id to 4 after we already posted the PR. Dismissed = FDE-driven close of an unknown-PO drift (corrective commit 2026-05-29) — GRN should not be received.

fields.label: GRN Invoice Number
fields.description: EE's `grn_invoice_number` — free-text, may be 'AutoGrn' / blank / junk ('123', 'jghvhgv' have been observed on Harmony). Captured raw; consumed by §9 Stage 3 as supplier_delivery_note on the resulting Purchase Receipt.

fields.label: GRN Invoice Date
fields.description: EE's `grn_invoice_date`. Consumed by §9 Stage 3 as ecs_supplier_invoice_date on the resulting Purchase Receipt.

fields.label: grn_status_id (latest observed)
fields.description: EE GRN lifecycle: 1 CREATED · 2 QC Pending · 3 QC Complete · 4 Deleted. Compared against `grn_receipt_trigger_status` setting (default 3) to decide whether to receipt. Latest value observed — Stage 3 sweeps refresh this on every poll.

fields.label: Total GRN Value (observed)
fields.description: EE's `total_grn_value` — cross-checked by §9 Stage 3 against the PR base_total to catch silent EE-side value-only edits.

fields.label: EasyEcom Resolution Keys
fields.description: Three keys earn their place on this row: inwarded_warehouse_c_id (Gate-0 hinge — Location.location_key); vendor_c_id (Supplier Map READ key — note: different from PO push's WRITE key, by design); po_ref_num + ee_po_id (PO resolution — primary on po_ref_num=PO name, fallback on po_id when ref is blank/junk).

fields.label: Inwarded Warehouse c_id
fields.description: EE's `inwarded_warehouse_c_id`. Gate-0 lookup hinge — must resolve via §8a EasyEcom Location.location_key to an EE-mapped Warehouse. Misses are silent-skipped (Stage 3) and never create a GRN Map row in the first place.

fields.label: Vendor c_id (READ key)
fields.description: EE's `vendor_c_id` from the GRN payload. Resolves to ERPNext Supplier via Supplier Map.ee_vendor_c_id (READ key) — DIFFERENT field from PO push's Supplier Map.ee_vendor_id (WRITE key). The §8.3 two-id split pays off here: pull resolves on the read key, push targets the write key, both stored on the same Supplier Map row.

fields.label: PO Reference Number
fields.description: EE's `po_ref_num` — free-text, may be blank/junk. PRIMARY PO join key: if it resolves to an ERPNext Purchase Order name, link via PO Map. Real Harmony observations: grn 141653 has '' (empty), grn 141461 has 'jghvhgv' (junk) — fallback to ee_po_id covers those.

fields.label: EE po_id (fallback)
fields.description: FALLBACK PO join key when po_ref_num is blank/junk. Resolves via PO Map.ee_po_id → linked PO. Always populated by EE in the GRN payload (`po_id`).

fields.label: Purchase Receipt
fields.description: The ERPNext Purchase Receipt created by §9 Stage 3 for this GRN. NULL when: status=Pending (not yet processable), status=Held-Pre-QC (below trigger), status=STN-Routed (§10's problem, no PR), status=Failed (receipting blew up). One-to-one with PR — never one-to-many.

fields.label: Linked PO Map
fields.description: The PO Map row this GRN's PO resolves to. NULL when the PO is EE-born and the §9 push hasn't created an ERPNext PO yet (out-of-order case — §9 Stage 3 raises a Discrepancy and the FDE links). NULL also when STN-Routed (no PO concept).

fields.label: Routed to STN
fields.description: §9 ↔ §10 boundary marker. SET when vendor_c_id == inwarded_warehouse_c_id at observation time (EE-internal inward: batch loads, system transfers, opening stock — not procurement). When set, §9 creates NO PR; §10 STN-inward picks up. Real Harmony examples: grn 142698/142703/141936 all self-vendor 26564; 141936 has total_grn_value=49990 with real apparel SKU AW21ANDMCS834-Beige-XXL-Casual Regular — §10 must handle valued self-GRNs.

fields.label: Last Observed At
fields.description: When this row was last refreshed by a §9 Stage 3 pull. Used to detect stale rows (e.g. GRN deleted upstream without status flip).

fields.label: GRN Payload (preserved, JSON)
fields.description: Corrective commit 2026-05-29 (unknown-PO drift). Stores the raw EE GRN payload (grn_row + line items: received_quantity, qc_fail, grn_detail_price, batch_code, expire_date, grn_detail_id, sku, ean, etc.) at pull time so the FDE 'Create PR from this GRN' action can rebuild a Purchase Receipt later without re-pulling. Populated ONLY on unknown-PO drift; normal Receipted/Held/STN paths leave this empty.
